sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31125" key="ei(matanwperi/ballos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἱμᾰτᾰνωπερίβαλλος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n31125.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who wraps his cloak about him</tr_>, com. word in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1392.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hegesand.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
